## Editing.noOpRollback() function

Create a no-op rollback function for operations that cannot be rolled back.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function noOpRollback(): () => Result<void>;
```
**Returns:**

() =&gt; Result&lt;void&gt;

Rollback function that always succeeds
